{"title": "Moon Landing 1969", "target_duration_sec": 150.0, "beats": [{"order": 1, "slug": "launch-pad", "action": "EXT. KENNEDY SPACE CENTER - NIGHT

Saturn V roars to life.", "duration_sec": 25.0}, {"order": 2, "slug": "translunar", "action": "INT. COMMAND MODULE - DAY

Earth shrinks in the window.", "duration_sec": 25.0}, {"order": 3, "slug": "lunar-descent", "action": "INT. EAGLE LUNAR MODULE - DAY

The Eagle has landed.", "duration_sec": 25.0}, {"order": 4, "slug": "first-step", "action": "EXT. MOON SURFACE - DAY

One small step.", "duration_sec": 25.0}, {"order": 5, "slug": "flag-planting", "action": "EXT. MOON SURFACE - DAY

Capsule splashes down.", "duration_sec": 25.0}]}
